free_text: Thermal neutron activation cross-sections for isomer
A scintillation spectrometer was used for
measuring radioactive nuclei decaying by gamma-rays
an end-window beta counter was employed
for those decaying through beta-particle emission.
No inf. about sources of uncertainties
